## What this changes

<!-- One or two sentences. Link the issue if there is one. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `bash enforcement/bin/check-kit.sh` passes
- [ ] `bash enforcement/tests/run-selftest.sh` passes
- [ ] No hand-typed skill counts or benchmark figures (the gates enforce this)
- [ ] No personal paths, names, or private project references
- [ ] No em-dashes
- [ ] If I added a gate or a runtime, I added a matching self-test fixture
- [ ] Claims stay honest: what is mechanically enforced vs advisory is stated, not implied
